news.t: KraneShares KSTR ETF Offers U.S. Investors Exposure to Cambricon, “China's answer to Nvidia,” Amid 2025 Rally

holdings.infoBox: KSTR is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cambricon Technologies Corporation stock at 14.51%, Hygon Information Technology at 9.93%, Montage Technology at 9.93%, Advanced Micro-Fabrication Equipment Inc. China at 7.08%, and Piotech at 4.37%.

overview.description: The KraneShares SSE STAR Market 50 Index ETF (KSTR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of the top 50 companies by market-cap that are listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange (SSE) Science and Technology Innovation Board. KSTR was launched on Jan 27, 2021 and is issued by KraneShares.
infoTable: China Shanghai Science & Technology Innovation Board 50 Index

data.text: NEW YORK, Oct. 03, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Cambricon Technologies Corporation Limited (“Cambricon”), often described as “China's answer to Nvidia1,” has been one of the standout performers on Shangha...
